jsonld.name: Semantic Friction
jsonld.description: A phenomenological state in which the attempt to articulate a phenomenon encounters an irreducible tension between the demands of exactness and the demands of depth. As one dimension increases, resistance to the other becomes more acute. The state involves recognising this friction in real-timeâ€”not as a problem to be solved but as a feature of the attempt itself.
